10.sourceTitle: Schwalbe Clik Valve | H&S Bike-Discount GmbH
10.evidenceText: No retail prices found in any of the three sources provided. The sources contain product descriptions, features, and product listings but no pricing information.
10.extractionRationale: After reviewing all three sources (bike-discount.de, bike24.com, and schwalbe.com), no retail prices in EUR or any other currency were mentioned. The sources focus on product features, descriptions, and listings but do not include pricing data.

27.sourceTitle: BBB Cycling CoreCap AL Valve BTI-166 Tubeless Ventil - schwarz | 80 mm | 2 Stück | BIKE24
27.evidenceText: 5 distinct product pages identified: p1993548 (80mm schwarz), p1993546 (40mm schwarz), p1993547 (60mm schwarz), p1993549 (40mm Kupfer), p1993550 (60mm Kupfer)
27.extractionRationale: Counted each unique URL as one product listing. All 5 URLs represent distinct CoreCap valve variants differentiated by size and color. Accessories mentioned on the pages (SteadyValve, AL Valve BTI-160, etc.) were excluded as they are not CoreCap listings.

30.evidenceText: All 5 product listings examined show only product descriptions and specifications without any stock status indicators or availability messages.
30.extractionRationale: Stock status information is not present in any of the 5 provided sources. The product pages contain descriptions but no explicit mention of stock availability or out-of-stock status.

56.evidenceText: Schlauch No. 17, Schlauch No. 19, Schlauch Nr. 15, Schlauch Nr. 15L-EL, Schlauch Nr. 6, Schlauch Nr. 3 - all with Clik Valve (SCV)
56.extractionRationale: Counted distinct Schwalbe inner tube models with Clik valve interface from the evidence. Identified 6 unique tube models (No. 3, No. 6, No. 15, No. 15L-EL, No. 17, No. 19). Excluded conversion kits (Umrüstkit), valves (Tubeless-Ventil), and adapters (Pumpenkopfadapter) as instructed.

61.sourceTitle: LME Aluminium Alloy | London Metal Exchange
61.evidenceText: Sources show LME Aluminium Alloy at 3510.00 and LME Aluminium Premium Duty Paid US Midwest at 2589.00, but neither represents the standard LME aluminum spot price with clear currency/unit specifications
61.extractionRationale: The provided sources contain prices for Aluminium Alloy and regional premium variants, not the standard LME Aluminum spot price. Without clarity on currency, unit (per ton vs per lb), and confirmation these are spot prices, I cannot reliably extract the requested value
